chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-496 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 1964/24 2.For order son CMA 1965/24 3.For orders on CMA 1966/24 4.For hearing of main case 02-05-2024 Mr. Iqbal Hussain Joyo, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G waives notice. ***** 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Petitioner has filed this petition for quashment of FIR No.27 of 2024, registered at P.S, Jhangro, under sections 447, 448, 457, 380 etc. on the ground that it relates to a civil dispute. However, after hearing learned counsel for petitioner and learned APG, who voluntarily waived notice, this petition is disposed of along with listed applications with directions to I.O to fairly conduct the investigation and submit Challan, if it has not already been submitted. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
